heading: Civil actions commenced by the United States
label: 1582 Civil actions commenced by the United States
notes: References in TextSections 592, 593A, 641(b)(6), 641(d)(2)(A), 704(i)(2), and 734(i)(2) of the Tariff Act of 1930, referred to in par. (1), are classified to sections 1592, 1593a, 1641(b)(6), 1641(d)(2)(A), 1671c(i)(2), and 1673c(i)(2), respectively, of Title 19, Customs Duties.

children.text: to recover a civil penalty under section 592, 593A, 641(b)(6), 641(d)(2)(A), 704(i)(2), or 734(i)(2) of the Tariff Act of 1930;
to recover upon a bond relating to the importation of merchandise required by the laws of the United States or by the Secretary of the Treasury; or
